name: Inbox: Communication Platfrom
description: Comprehensive communication hub combining team chat, email service, and unified messaging. Designed for seamless collaboration with real-time notifications and rich media support.

name: Home Page: Elastic Email
description: Modern marketing website for Elastic Email, a comprehensive email marketing and API platform. Built with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO, featuring responsive design, interactive product demonstrations, and conversion-focused landing pages.

name: Template Editor: Elastic Email
description: Intuitive email template editor with drag-and-drop interface and raw HTML editing capabilities. Features AI-powered template generation, customizable content blocks, mobile-responsive layouts, brand color management, and merge field personalization for creating stunning newsletters.
